title: Sour Crumbly Vietnamese Coconut Crumble
description: This festive Vietnamese dish is a whole30-friendly dessert featuring cinnamon and tadka spices for a touch of warmth.

ingredients.name: sweetener of choice (e.g. honey or maple syrup, optional)

instructions: In a saucepan, mix coconut cream and cornstarch until smooth.
Add cinnamon powder if using and vanilla extract. If using tadka spices blend, add now too.
Bring to a simmer over medium heat while stirring continuously.
Once the mixture thickens, remove from heat and let cool slightly.
If using sweetener, mix it into the cooled sauce until well combined.
Pour the crumble onto a baking dish or plate. Chill in the fridge for at least 30 minutes before serving.
